title: Sync timeline widgets so that timeline moves in parallel
excerpt:

posts.author: NaomiCoe (Naomi Coe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team currently uses a view with multiple timeline widgets filtered to show different information, including team and other resource availability.

Currently, when you change date range (weeks/months etc.) you have to do this across all widgets. When you scroll to move the timeline on one widget, the others are static. So it’s really easy to mis-schedule resources. Having to carefully change each individual timeline is cumbersome.

We’d love to see a way to ‘pin’ the date across all the timeline widgets or somehow sync them so that when navigating around the timeframe on screen is the same across all timelines.
